body:
PASS 3 COMPLETE (partial scope, honestly reported) -- forge-ledger + SLS(31) attached.

Read all 5 mail messages + installed EDGE_DOCTRINE.md at ~/.claude/skills/tungsten-forge/EDGE_DOCTRINE.md as instructed. The combined mandate (win-intelligence engines, 9 lenses, reverse-mining, retrospective intelligence) is too large for one pass without batching subsystems, so I scoped pass 3 to ONE real, concrete defect and logged the rest as a tracked roadmap (mandate_roadmap_2026_07_10 in the ledger) instead of either faking full coverage or silently dropping it.

First verified pass-1/pass-2 baseline: all 9 prior warrants (incl. WARRANT#9's n<500 power floor) are genuinely present in the compiled SLS(30) source -- the ledger's claims check out.

Then found a real one: WARRANT#9 fixed the Power Doctrine's n>=500 floor (Standing Prohibition #5) only in the main per-regime IC pipeline. Two sibling subsystems never got the fix -- OptimizeSessionWeightsPerRegime (Phase 3B.5) accepted a coordinate-descent weight fit from as few as ~20-34 bars; OptimizeVolatilityWeightsPerRegime (Phase 3B.6) ran a 4-stage, ~470,000-combination grid search against cells as thin as n=20 and validated the result unconditionally, no acceptance bar at all. Both directly relieve the live entry threshold and blend into the live composite score -- this is the exact overfit mechanism behind the real STAND DOWN verdict, just unpatched in two places WARRANT#9 never touched.

WARRANT#10 + WARRANT#11: raised both gates from n>=20 to n>=500, mirroring WARRANT#9 exactly. Minimal, mechanical, single blast-radius-scoped edits -- no change to the search logic itself. Version bumped 9.44->9.45, SLS(30)->SLS(31), compiled clean via PowerShell metaeditor (0 errors, 1 pre-existing unrelated warning). Ledger updated and independently validated as parseable JSON.

Still not done, same gap as passes 1-2: nothing has been calibration-validated yet. Zero of 11 total warrants across 3 passes have been measured against a real run -- that's flagged in the ledger as the single highest-leverage next step, ahead of any new mandate scope. Next real action: attach SLS(31).ex4 to a demo chart and run a fresh calibration, same as was pending for SLS(30).

Files attached: SLS(31).mq4, SLS(31).ex4, updated forge_ledger.json.
